answer:
The Ahrefs MCP server is an official, remote service that allows AI assistants like Claude, ChatGPT, and Cursor to securely access Ahrefs SEO and marketing data [1][2][3]. It enables automated workflows for keyword research, backlink analysis, rank tracking, and site audits [2][4].

To use the service, you must have an active Ahrefs plan (Lite or higher) [1][2]. The server is hosted at the following endpoint:

`https://api.ahrefs.com/mcp/mcp`

Configure your MCP client by adding this URL to your configuration file [2][5]. For clients requiring authentication, generate an MCP-scoped API key in your Ahrefs workspace settings and provide it as a Bearer token [2]. Note that older, self-hosted npm packages (such as `@ahrefs/mcp`) were archived in February 2026 and should not be used [6][2].
